message:
feat(freeze): Add define_var opcode Zig support

Convert define_var opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode defines a global variable with default flags.

Stack effect: [] -> [] (no stack change)

Implementation:
- Gets global object
- Creates atom from variable name
- Defines property with UNDEFINED value and C_W_E flags
  (configurable, writable, enumerable - typical var behavior)
- Frees atom and global references
- In Zig: uses qjs. prefix and discards DefinePropertyValue return
- In C: uses standard QuickJS API
